rows.label: tev000595_MSG0001
rows.name:
Evening, [ST:playername ]. Funny running
into you here, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0002
rows.name:
I was just about to go have dinner
with Mythos and Lieutenant Iriina.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0003
rows.name:
But the lieutenant wanted to buy something
at that store, so I'm just waiting for her
to finish. Shouldn't be too long now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_JNK0010
rows.name: Support

rows.label: tev000595_SEL0011
rows.name: Suggest that Gwin buy a present for Iriina.

rows.label: tev000595_JNK0020
rows.name: Propose

rows.label: tev000595_SEL0021
rows.name: Offer to take Iriina's place at dinner.

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0004
rows.name: A...present? What?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0005
rows.name:
Um, so, yeah. Today isn't any sort of special day, and
I don't have any reason to give her one, sooo... Yeah.
I think she would find that pretty suspicious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0006
rows.name:
But I HAVE been thinking that I might use my
share of our next assignment reward to get her
something really incredible for her birthday.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0007
rows.name:
Like maybe that new assault rifle from
Sakuraba Industries? What do you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0008
rows.name:
Are you insane? Iriina would be FURIOUS! Hell,
the only thing I'd be eating for dinner would be
the burst grenade she'd shove down my throat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0009
rows.name:
And after all the time I spent planning to
get her something really great for her birthday,
she probably wouldn't even accept it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0010
rows.name:
I already put a preorder down on that new Sakuraba
Industries assault rifle, but...yeah. I still don't
know if that's the best gift for her or not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_JNK0030
rows.name: Suggest MEREDES & Co.

rows.label: tev000595_SEL0031
rows.name: Recommend a MEREDES & Co. weapon instead.

rows.label: tev000595_JNK0040
rows.name: Suggest Candid & Credible

rows.label: tev000595_SEL0041
rows.name: Recommend Candid & Credible protective wear instead.

rows.label: tev000595_JNK0050
rows.name: Suggest a Ring

rows.label: tev000595_SEL0051
rows.name: Recommend that Gwin buy Iriina a ring.

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0011
rows.name: A weapon from MEREDES & Co., huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0012
rows.name:
Well, if that's your suggestion,
I'm sure she'd love it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0013
rows.name:
Maybe I should take a closer look at
some of the other options instead of
just grabbing that Sakuraba one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0014
rows.name: Thanks for your opinion. It means a lot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0015
rows.name:
Oh, looks like she's
coming back out now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0016
rows.name:
Well, I've got to go. Himeri we can
work together on a mission soon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0017
rows.name: Protective wear from Candid & Credible?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well, the lieutenant really loves
her weapons, but she doesn't put
much effort into her armor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0019
rows.name:
So that might actually make a better
gift. Thanks for the idea, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0020
rows.name:
But wait. Isn't the ladies' wear
from Candid & Credible designed to
look kinda like a...miniskirt?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0021
rows.name:
Oh! Looks like the lieutenant's
coming back out now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0022
rows.name: Well, uh, I better go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0023
rows.name:
Let's discuss the details of this
equipment later. ...Like how in the
heck I'd convince her to wear it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0024
rows.name: ...Seriously?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0025
rows.name:
That's moving a bit
fast, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0026
rows.name:
I mean, I don't even know if I
have enough money. I'd have to buy
a matching set of rings, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0027
rows.name:
Huh... I wonder if instead of buying a
pre-made one, I could make one out of
resources mined through FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0028
rows.name:
But what resource should I use? Maybe
dawnstones? Or everfreeze ore?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0029
rows.name:
Uh-oh! Looks like the
lieutenant's coming back out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000595_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well, I've got to go. Himeri we can
work together on a mission soon.[ST:wait ]
